title: Approval
description: A time-bounded approval bound to one exact action and policy digest. An approval satisfies a gate; it does not lower any governance floor.

decision_id.description: Identifier of the REFER decision this approval addresses.

action_hash.description: Opaque digest binding the approval to the exact canonical Action.

policy_digest.description: Opaque digest binding the approval to the evaluated policy artifact.

tenant_id.description: Tenant boundary within which the approval is valid.

expires_at_ms.description: Unix expiry timestamp in milliseconds. Consumers must reject expired approvals.

scope.description: Version 1 approvals are always scoped to exactly one action hash.

contractVersion.description: Semantic contract version. This package supports major version 1 and emits 1.0.0.
